title: [Savills x WTP Advisory] Gateway to Growth 2024: Ha Noi and Northern Vietnam's Investment Landscape
metaDescription: An exclusive event exploring investment opportunities across Hanoi and northern Vietnam, co-hosted by WTP Advisory and Savills.
about: Join us for an exclusive event diving into the dynamic investment landscape of Hanoi and Northern Vietnam. Discover why this region is becoming a hotspot for global investors and learn about key sectors, emerging trends, and strategic insights.

Hanoi's growth trajectory is promisingly robust, growing 6.27% in GDP in 2023. While the service sector served as the key driver, industry and construction demonstrated positive momentum with potential for future development.

Apart from Hanoi, Hai Phong is actively transforming into a significant commercial center with multiple industrial parks, while Bac Ninh is home to some of the largest manufacturing plants in the country, including Microsoft, Canon, Samsung, and Foxconn.
